description_long: This is a military-style, single-propeller airplane with a dark green camouflage exterior and a streamlined fuselage. The wings are straight and mid-mounted, extending symmetrically from the body with visible ailerons and flaps. The cockpit is enclosed with a glass canopy, positioned forward on the fuselage, and features a multi-panel window design. The nose houses a single propeller engine, and the tail section includes a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. Red circular insignias are visible on the wings and tail, suggesting a historical or military context. The surface appears metallic with a matte finish, and the landing gear is not visible, possibly indicating a retractable configuration.
description: A dark green, single-propeller military airplane with a streamlined body, mid-mounted straight wings, and an enclosed forward cockpit. Red insignias and a matte metallic finish are visible.
description_view_0: Front view showing the propeller, symmetrical wings, and the glass canopy cockpit.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, cockpit placement, and red insignia on the tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the back of the wings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible propeller, cockpit, and tail insignia.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single piston engine mounted in the nose with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible; likely retractable based on typical design.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a multi-panel glass canopy, likely single-seat.
